segment_summary: This segment explains the difference between business and platform services, focusing on their distinct data isolation levels. It then introduces the 'master instance' concept, illustrating how base data can be shared across customers while allowing for custom additions. The speaker provides an architectural overview of how the isolation component integrates into a microservice, using JWT tokens to propagate tenant and instance IDs for automatic data filtering. Finally, the segment transitions to a live demo, showcasing the initial setup of a `DbContext` before implementing the isolation component.
